basic_info.short_form: Sinhgad Institute Of Management And Computer Application Narhe

address.address: S.No. 49/1, Off Westerly By-Pass, Pune-Bangalore Expressway, Narhe India
address.map_location: Sinhgad Institute Of Management And Computer Application , Pune

pos_sentences: The fees are okay and the curriculum is also very good as it is designed by one of the best universities in India, i.e. Pune University.
Well, good companies came for marketing and finance, but HR students struggled to secure internships with good companies.
Placements are good, and they provide excellent job opportunities. All students have access to these opportunities.
I am from outside Maharashtra, so there are no scholarships provided to us by the college. However, the students who belong to Maharashtra receive a very good scholarship from the college.
The extracurricular activities are very good; the faculty supports every extracurricular activity and also supports education.
Regarding the hostel, good facilities are provided, including WiFi which is available.
Sinhagad Institute is known for providing the best faculty and course infrastructure to help students learn.
neg_sentences: Placement opportunities are available for marketing students at companies like Kohlberg, ITC, and ICICI Bank, offering an average package ranging from 0 to 4 lakhs. However, it is rare for students to receive a package of 2.5 lakhs.

Placement opportunities for marketing students include companies like Kohlberg, ITC, ICICI Bank, and many others. These companies offer packages ranging from 2 to 4 lakhs, with an average of 2.5 lakhs. However, it is rare for students to secure such packages.

Gender ratios were 50:50; not many workshops and cultural activities were available. The college was open to providing opportunities to female candidates. Not much time was spent on building the confidence of academically poor candidates.
In the Shingad Institute of Management and Computer Applications, the hostel is too good, but the mess facilities are too bad
